subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Abhar! Upon thee be My salutation, My loving-kindness and My mercy. The letter which thou didst dispatch to Badí'u'lláh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابهر علیک سلامی و عنایتی و رحمتی نامه که نزد بدیع الله ارسال داشتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
